message:
feat: add FT_SKIP_BUNDLED_FONT_INSTALL env var to opt out of auto font install

Adds an environment variable escape hatch for the bundled Pragmasevka
font auto-install behavior. Setting FT_SKIP_BUNDLED_FONT_INSTALL=1
(or true/yes/on) prevents automatic font installation during ft
invocations, useful for CI environments or when font management is
handled externally.

main.rs:
- FT_SKIP_BUNDLED_FONT_INSTALL_ENV constant
- bundled_font_auto_install_disabled() parser for truthy values
- Wired into should_auto_install_bundled_font() as early return
- Tests for truthy/falsey value parsing
- Test for install idempotency and marker metadata verification

README.md:
- Documents ft setup font --apply for manual install/reinstall
- Documents the env var opt-out usage pattern

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -207,6 +207,12 @@ ft setup
 # Bundled Pragmasevka Nerd Font auto-installs on normal ft usage
 # (no `ft setup font --apply` required), and generated wezterm config
 # defaults to it automatically.
+
+# Manual install / reinstall path:
+ft setup font --apply
+
+# Opt out of automatic font install for this invocation:
+FT_SKIP_BUNDLED_FONT_INSTALL=1 ft status
 ```
 
 ### 2. Verify Terminal Backend Connectivity
